headline: Why is Bernstein Cautious While Charter Communications, Inc. (CHTR) Could 10x by 2030?
summary: Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHTR) is one of the stocks that could 10x by 2030. On May 26, Bernstein SocGen reiterated a Market Perform rating on Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHTR) and a $210 price target. The cautious outlook comes as the research firm insists the company is facing pressure and concerns about leverage and liquidity. Charter […]
